Find Customer.description: Look up a customer by their Stripe ID, or list customers matched by email.

Find Charge.description: Retrieve an existing charge by its Stripe ID.

Find Payment.description: Retrieve an existing payment intent by its Stripe ID.

Find Invoice.description: Retrieve an existing invoice by its Stripe ID.

Find Subscription.description: Retrieve a subscription by ID, or list a customer's subscriptions.

Find Account Balance.description: Retrieve the current Stripe account balance.

Find Balance Transactions.description: List the transactions that have affected the account balance.
